zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord William Ramsay II of Dalhousie於從大約1193年到1210年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾豪希時，他的父親William Ramsay I of Dalhousie51歲，母親Nessus33歲。他和Lady William de Ramsay至少有5個兒子。他去世於1255年在英國蘇格蘭安格斯。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant (the usual spelling in Scotland) of Ramsey . The Scottish Ramsays derive from Simund de Ramesie, recorded before 1175, who went to Scotland from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire).

variants.name: Ramsey
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish (Antrim): habitational name from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire, now part of Cambridgeshire), from Old English hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’. Alternatively, the name may also arise from Ramsey (Essex), probably from the same etymology as the Huntingdonshire placename. However, this is unlikely to be the source of the Scottish surname. This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, where it is probably in most if not all cases an altered form of Scottish Ramsay .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William Ramsay II of Dalhousie was born from about 1193 to 1210, in Dalhousie, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Ramsay I of Dalhousie, was 51 and his mother, Nessus, was 33. He had at least 5 sons with Lady William de Ramsay. He died in 1255, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William Ramsay II of Dalhousie est né du environ 1193 au 1210, à Dalhousie, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Ramsay I of Dalhousie, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Nessus, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Lady William de Ramsay. Il est décédé en 1255, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord William Ramsay II of Dalhousie von um 1193 bis 1210 in Dalhousie, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Ramsay I of Dalhousie 51 und seine Mutter Nessus 33. Er hatte mit Lady William de Ramsay mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1255 in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William Ramsay II of Dalhousie è nato il da circa 1193 a 1210 nel Dalhousie, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Ramsay I of Dalhousie, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Nessus, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Lady William de Ramsay. Morì nel 1255, nel Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord William Ramsay II of Dalhousieがから約1193年まで1210年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンダルハウシで生まれた時，父William Ramsay I of Dalhousieは51歳，母Nessusは33歳であった。彼はLady William de Ramsayとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1255年にイギリススコットランドアンガスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord William Ramsay II of Dalhousie(이)가 대략 1193년 부터 1210년 까지 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 다하시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ramsay I of Dalhousie(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Nessus(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Lady William de Ramsay(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1255년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William Ramsay II of Dalhousie nasceu de aproximadamente 1193 a 1210, em Dalhousie, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Ramsay I of Dalhousie, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Nessus, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Lady William de Ramsay. Ele faleceu em 1255, em Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William Ramsay II of Dalhousie родился с около 1193 по 1210 в местности далхоуси, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Ramsay I of Dalhousie было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Nessus, 33. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Lady William de Ramsay. Он умер в 1255 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания.
